ddls:
CREATE TABLE "proxy_servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proxy server */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the proxy server */,
  "port" INTEGER /* Port number used by the proxy server */,
  "anonymity" TEXT /* Anonymity level of the proxy server (e.g., Transparent, Anonymous, Elite) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the proxy server is located */,
  "speed" TEXT /* Response speed of the proxy server in milliseconds */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the proxy server (active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "uptime_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of time the server has been operational */,
  "lastchecked" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last performance check */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider or vendor of the proxy server */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the server location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the server location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proxy_servers_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proxy_servers_anonymity FOREIGN KEY ("anonymity") REFERENCES anonymity_levels ("anonymity_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (active, suspended, etc.) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* User's timezone for personalized experiences */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the proxy server */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the proxy server being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "ip_source" TEXT /* Original IP address of the user */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request (HTTP, HTTPS, etc.) */,
  "response_code" INTEGER /* HTTP response code received */,
  "bandwidth_used" REAL /* Amount of bandwidth used during the session in MB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES proxy_servers ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the proxy server */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for the performance metric */,
  "average_speed" TEXT /* Average response speed during this period */,
  "total_requests" INTEGER /* Total number of requests handled by the server */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Percentage of failed requests */,
  "latency" REAL /* Average latency in milliseconds */,
  "throughput" REAL /* Number of requests handled per second */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES proxy_servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anonymity_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anonymity level */,
  "anonymity_type" TEXT /* Type of anonymity (e.g., Transparent, Anonymous, Elite) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what this anonymity level implies */,
  "security_rating" INTEGER /* Security rating indicating the level of security provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country entry */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO country code for standardized identification */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Primary timezone of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)
